Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-08 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows two exceptional performers dominating the momentum rankings. ELA leads with a composite score of 97.5 and rank #1, displaying extraordinary consistency across all timeframes—up 283% over one year with a 1-year/3-month ratio of 3.36 and all four SMA gates passing, though its momentum_signal of 3.55 flags it as "overextended," suggesting potential pullback risk. STRO follows with even more aggressive returns (305% one-year, 308% six-month), posting a 1-week/1-day ratio spike of 12.69 that indicates very rapid recent acceleration, but maintains a stronger bad_spy_score of 2.837 compared to ELA's 3.78, meaning it has held up better on market down days. Both names pass all ratio consistency checks and trade above all major moving averages, indicating structural strength, yet ELA's volatility ratio of 1.68 with "confirmed" status combined with its overextended flag suggests caution on near-term entry, while STRO's more measured resilience scoring may indicate better risk-adjusted momentum setup.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
